text:
4 things hands-free Threads growth taught me:

1. Consistency comes from systems, not willpower. One afternoon of setup beats months of daily posting.

2. Free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI APIs) run the entire loop. No subscriptions, no creep.

3. The official Meta API is the only way to automate safely. No browser hacks, no ban risk.

4. A system that reads its own analytics and rewrites tomorrow’s posts beats every growth hack I’ve tried.

Two hours. Zero maintenance. Tokens...
